title: post api agent valid request returns analysis verdict
description: Test POST /api/agent with valid coin_symbol (DOGE), contract_address, and chain_id to verify it returns 200 status with valid schema.

title: post api agent missing coin_symbol returns 400
description: Test POST /api/agent with missing coin_symbol to verify it returns 400 status with error message.

title: post api agent missing contract_address returns 400
description: Test POST /api/agent with missing contract_address to verify it returns 400 status with error message.

title: post api agent empty payload returns 400
description: Test POST /api/agent with empty body to verify it returns 400 status with error message.

title: post api agent fake coin returns 200 with fallback
description: Test POST /api/agent with fake coin (FAKE) to verify it gracefully degrades and returns 200 (or handles error gracefully without a 500 server crash, or returns 200 with fallback object).
